items.title: Nandan Nilekani leaves GP role at Fundamentum as it launches $200M third fund
items.summary: Nilekani remains Fundamentum's anchor investor as the firm expands its leadership team and targets AI and fintech startups in India.

items.title: Truecaller clashes with India’s telecom regulator over anti-spam rules
items.summary: The caller ID company says users are increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from India's dedicated business number series.

items.title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
items.summary: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

items.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
items.summary: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

items.title: Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders
items.summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said emergency scenes are not "edge cases."

items.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
items.summary: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

items.title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
items.summary: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that appl...

items.title: Autonomous drone delivery startup Manna plots major US expansion
items.summary: Manna is launching a U.S. operations and manufacturing facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, that will eventually employ 1,000 people.

items.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
items.summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

items.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
items.summary: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

items.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
items.summary: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

items.title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
items.summary: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking...

items.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
items.summary: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

items.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
items.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they&#8...

items.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
items.summary: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect...

items.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
items.summary: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

items.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raises $1.2B to invest in ‘technical frontier’ startups
items.summary: For Paradigm, the technical frontier will stretch beyond its cryptocurrency investment roots. This fund is expected to expand its investment focus to include robotics and AI.

items.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
items.summary: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

items.title: Another massive data breach exposed millions of driver’s license numbers
items.summary: The cyberattack targeting a U.S. insurance giant is the largest known breach of driver's license numbers so far in 2026.

items.title: These AI startups are growing  revenue at faster and faster rates
items.summary: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.
